rationale: Educ. Code §11.153 governs sale of minerals owned by school districts. It is unrelated to residence homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.153. SALE OF MINERALS. (a) Minerals in land belonging to an independent school district may be sold to any person under this section.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns mineral sales by school districts, not homestead exemptions.
